The Real Problem

The internet is full of content
you can no longer trust

Scams, deepfakes, AI-written fraud, and forged documents are at an all-time high — and getting harder to spot. Check AI was built to give you certainty.

India lost over Rs 11,000 crore to cyber fraud in 2024 alone

Fake images, AI voice clones, forged documents, and synthetic videos are the top tools used by fraudsters targeting individuals and businesses across India.

Deepfake Videos & Images

Criminals use AI to swap faces and clone voices — impersonating family, colleagues, or public figures.

High Risk

Forged Documents

Fake Aadhaar, PAN, salary slips, and certificates submitted for loans, jobs, and identity verification.

Very Common

AI-Written Scam Messages

Phishing emails, fake job offers, and fraudulent notices now written by AI — grammatically perfect.

Growing Fast

Fake Profile Photos

AI-generated faces used in romance scams, fake job listings, and social media impersonation.

Romance Scam

Manipulated News Videos

Video clips cut, spliced, or AI-enhanced to change context — spreading viral misinformation.

Misinformation

Check AI Protects You

Multi-signal forensic analysis — detecting manipulation and AI generation invisible to the human eye.

Your Shield

Capabilities

Every format. Every signal.

Image Detection

AI-generated and deepfake images detected with pixel-level precision and GAN fingerprinting.

Video Analysis

Frame-by-frame deepfake detection, face-swap checks, and audio-visual sync analysis.

Document Verification

Detect forged PDFs, AI-filled forms, and manipulated certificates including fake Aadhaar and PAN.

Text Origin

Identify AI-written content across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and other major models.

Truth Meter™ Score

Live animated gauge showing your 0–100 authenticity score with clear human/uncertain/AI verdict.

Zero Data Retention

All content processed in-memory and deleted immediately. Your files never touch our storage.

About Check AI

Built for India.
Built to protect.

With deepfakes and AI-generated fraud reaching every corner of India, Check AI was built as the definitive tool for content authenticity — free, fast, and private.

Made in India

Built by Indians for Indians. We understand the local context — Aadhaar fraud, PAN forgery, and WhatsApp scams targeting Indian users daily.

Zero Data Retention

Your files are processed in-memory and deleted immediately. We never store your images, videos, or documents.

Forensic AI Engine

We use one of the world's most accurate AI content detection platforms — not black-box algorithms.

Accessible Detection

Designed to be fast and simple — AI detection should be accessible to individuals and businesses alike.

Multi-Format Support

Images, videos, text, and upcoming news/document checks — four content types, one unified detection engine.

REST API

Integrate Check AI into your own products. Perfect for media companies, HRtech, fintechs, and legal firms.

Developer API

Integrate Check AI
anywhere.

REST API with straightforward endpoints. Integrate content authenticity detection into your product in minutes.

POST/api/analyzeUniversal AI detection
POST/api/payment/create-orderCreate Cashfree order
POST/api/payment/verifyVerify payment signature
GET/api/user/historyScan history
GET/api/user/profileUser profile & usage
Python Example
import requests

# Detect AI in an image
response = requests.post(
  "https://api.checkai.in/api/analyze",
  headers={"Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"},
  data={"type": "img"},
  files={"file": open("photo.jpg", "rb")}
)
result = response.json()
print(result["verdict"]) # "AI Generated"
print(result["confidence"]) # 97
Response Format
{"verdict":"AI Generated","confidence":97,"isAI":true,"signals":[{"name":"GAN Fingerprint","percent":96},...],"processingMs":1240}

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2, 2025  ·  Effective: April 2, 2025  ·  Check AI Technologies, Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

This Privacy Policy explains how Check AI Technologies ("Check AI", "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website at check ai and related services. By using Check AI, you agree to this policy.

1. Who We Are

Check AI Technologies is an AI content detection service based in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India. We operate the website check ai and provide AI-generated content detection services to individuals and businesses.

For any privacy-related questions, contact us at: [email protected]

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide

  • Account information: Name, email address, and password when you create an account
  • Payment information: Processed securely by Cashfree — we never store your card details
  • Content submitted for analysis: Images, text, or other files you upload for detection

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

  • IP address and browser type for security and rate limiting
  • Usage data: number of scans, scan types, timestamps
  • Device and browser information for compatibility

2.3 Content You Upload

We do not store your uploaded files. All images, videos, and documents are processed in-memory and permanently deleted immediately after analysis.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide AI content detection services
  • To manage your account and subscription
  • To process payments via Cashfree
  • To track your monthly scan usage against your plan limits
  • To send important account notifications
  • To comply with Indian laws and regulations

4. Data Storage and Security

Your account data is stored securely in Google Firebase Firestore. We implement HTTPS encryption, Firebase Authentication, and zero file storage.

5. Third-Party Services

  • Forensic AI Engine — Our AI detection provider. Files sent for analysis are deleted immediately.
  • Google Firebase — Authentication and database. policies.google.com/privacy
  • Cashfree — Payment processing. cashfree.com/privacy-policy
  • Render.com — Backend hosting.

6. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party.

7. Your Rights

  • Access: Request a copy of the data we hold about you
  • Correction: Update incorrect personal information
  • Deletion: Request deletion of your account and all associated data
  • Portability: Receive your data in a machine-readable format

Email us at [email protected]. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Governing Law

This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of India, including the Information Technology Act, 2000. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India.

9. Contact Us

Check AI Technologies
Nagpur, Maharashtra, India
Email: [email protected]
Website: check ai

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 2, 2025  ·  Effective: April 2, 2025  ·  Check AI Technologies, Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Check AI. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.

1. Acceptance of Terms

These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Check AI Technologies governing your use of check ai. By creating an account or using our services, you confirm you are at least 18 years old.

2. Description of Service

Check AI provides AI-generated content detection services. We offer:

  • Pro Plan: ₹829/month — full access to all detection types

3. Account Registration

To access certain features, you must create an account with accurate information and keep your password secure.

4. Acceptable Use

You may use Check AI only for lawful purposes. You agree NOT to: use the service to facilitate fraud, upload malicious content, attempt to reverse-engineer our API, circumvent rate limits, or create deepfakes for malicious purposes.

5. Payments and Subscriptions

5.1 Billing

Paid plans are billed monthly via Cashfree in INR.

5.2 Refund Policy

All payments are non-refundable once a subscription period has begun. Contact [email protected] within 7 days for billing errors.

5.3 Cancellation

Cancel at any time. Access continues until end of billing period.

6. Accuracy Disclaimer

Check AI provides probabilistic results. Our results are not 100% accurate and should not be the sole basis for legal or financial decisions.

Important: Check AI detection results are for informational purposes only. Do not use them as definitive proof in legal proceedings without expert verification.

7. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Nagpur, Maharashtra, India.

8. Contact Us

Nagpur, Maharashtra, India
